title: Knowledge Representation Path
description: Build fluency in Knowledge Representation inside AI Theory by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Knowledge Base
steps.summary: Knowledge Base belongs to the AI Theory area of AI/ML, within Knowledge Representation. It sits inside AI Theory / Knowledge Representation. Start after Base Model. It opens into Cyc Knowledge Base and Knowledge Base Memory.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Grounding
steps.summary: Grounding belongs to the AI Theory area of AI/ML, within Knowledge Representation. It sits inside AI Theory / Knowledge Representation. Compare it with Confabulation and Knowledge Base. It opens into Source Grounding and Language Grounding.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
